title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Build scalable backend systems and APIs. Work with modern tech stack.
requirements: 5+ years backend experience with Node.js or Python. Strong system design skills.

title: Product Manager
description: Lead product strategy and roadmap. Work closely with engineering and design.
requirements: 3+ years PM experience. Strong analytical and communication skills.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create beautiful user interfaces with React. Collaborate with designers.
requirements: 3+ years React experience. Strong CSS and design sense.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze large datasets and build ML models. Present insights to stakeholders.
requirements: PhD or Masters in related field. Experience with Python and ML frameworks.

title: UX Designer
description: Design user-centered experiences. Conduct user research and testing.
requirements: Portfolio required. 2+ years UX design experience.
